finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_15.md:77; chapters/chapter_15.md:79; chapters/chapter_15.md:81; chapters/chapter_15.md:83; chapters/chapter_15.md:85; chapters/chapter_15.md:157; chapters/chapter_15.md:161; chapters/chapter_15.md:163; chapters/chapter_15.md:165; chapters/chapter_15.md:169; chapters/chapter_15.md:171; chapters/chapter_15.md:175; chapters/chapter_15.md:187; chapters/chapter_15.md:189; chapters/chapter_15.md:201; chapters/chapter_15.md:203
finding_results.notes: Petra scene (lines 77-85): broke the consecutive bare-confirmation chain by having Margot combine her February/restricted-ops/crash answer into one line and replacing the second bare 'Yes' with 'Every one of them' — Margot-direct but not a generic confirmation. Petra self-corrects mid-exchange (touches glasses, consolidates her accusation), consistent with her character profile's hedging-under-pressure and self-correction-toward-precision traits. The scene retains its clinical interrogation shape but no longer has 3+ consecutive one-beat assent responses. Kai scene (lines 157-205): restructured from accusation-confirmation ladder to Margot-driven confession. Kai opens with institutional data (the feed logs) rather than personal accusation, stalls, then manages one personal statement ('She lost two laps'). Margot volunteers the full confession unprompted — the desync, the heart-rate pushing, the lie about acceptable parameters, the severity she concealed, and why she didn't speak up. This inverts the Petra scene's dynamic: there Petra extracts information; here Margot provides it before Kai can build to accusation. Removed echo exchanges ('And you kept connecting'/'I kept connecting', 'Tomas's was twelve'/'Yeah', 'Seventy-seven sessions'/'That sounds right') that duplicated the Petra scene's mechanics. Restored snapshot roughness in Stuttgart passage ('I — I noticed', 'Every athlete's got'). The two scenes now run on materially different conversational mechanics while preserving all must-land beats and the transmission-vector payoff.

summary: Revised both confrontation scenes to eliminate the shared interrogation-ladder pattern. The Petra scene retains its clinical-review mechanics with tighter turn structure and no consecutive bare confirmations. The Kai scene was substantially restructured: instead of Kai accusing and Margot confirming in sequence, Margot now drives the confession voluntarily while Kai circles through institutional data and processes physically. All must-land beats preserved (phantom, feed log review, suspension, addiction described plainly, transmission vector payoff). Restored productive spoken roughness from the snapshot in the Stuttgart passage. No new continuity contradictions introduced.
